sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_a: Combinational FP32-to-quantized conversion for matrix A using Q15 scale and zero-point.
sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_b: Combinational FP32-to-quantized conversion for matrix B using Q15 scale and zero-point.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer GEMM over quantized matrices with zero-point subtraction and INT32 accumulation.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization to FP32 using the product of Q15 scales.
